query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
## Summary

The most recent NIFC year-to-date acres burned figure available **as of late June 2026** is:

**3,138,394 acres** (with **35,884 wildfires**), from the **Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) dated Tuesday, June 30, 2026 – 0730 MDT** — the last IMSR issued in June 2026 and the source that feeds NIFC's National Fire News and Statistics pages.

Key context:
- This was **159% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average** (1,977,688 acres) for that date.
- National Preparedness Level was **PL 4**.
- Three days earlier, the **June 27, 2026 IMSR** showed 2,951,605 acres / 35,424 fires (PL 3) — a jump of ~187,000 acres in three days, driven by Great Basin (UT/NV) and Rocky Mountain (CO) large fires.
- **Caveat:** The live NIFC pages have since updated to a later vintage (3,453,727 acres as of the July 11, 2026 report), which is *not* the late-June value. YTD figures are also subject to minor retroactive revision.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report — Tuesday June 30, 2026 – 0730 MDT
sources.snippet: Fires and Acres Year-to-Date (by Protection): TOTAL FIRES 35,884; TOTAL ACRES 3,138,394. Ten Year Average Acres 1,977,688 (159%).

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) | NICC
sources.snippet: The National IMSR provides a synopsis of national wildland fire activity, posted daily; archive includes June 2026 reports.

key_facts: NIFC IMSR dated June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT) reports Year-to-Date Acres Burned = 3,138,394 acres.
The same June 30, 2026 IMSR reports Year-to-Date Wildfires (Fires) = 35,884.
The June 30, 2026 YTD acres figure was 159% of the 2016-2025 ten-year average (1,977,688 acres); YTD fires were 133% of the ten-year average (27,042).
The June 30, 2026 IMSR is the last report issued in June 2026, making 3,138,394 acres the latest figure available 'as of late June 2026.'
National Preparedness Level was PL 4 on June 30, 2026 (raised from PL 3 on the June 27 report).
Prior late-June report (June 27, 2026 IMSR) showed 2,951,605 YTD acres and 35,424 fires — an increase of ~186,789 acres over three days.
Largest regional YTD contributor on June 30 was the Rocky Mountain Area (1,297,880 acres), followed by the Southern Area (1,041,805 acres).
The live NIFC Statistics/National Fire News pages have since updated to a later vintage (3,453,727 YTD acres, 38,747 fires) as of the July 11, 2026 report — not the late-June figure.
The IMSR is published by the National Interagency Coordination Center (NICC) and is the underlying source for NIFC's National Fire News and Statistics web pages.
